_comment: Example Claude Code plugin hook config. The PreToolUse hook intercepts the custom submit_review MCP tool, captures the real diff, opens the review UI, and blocks until the reviewer is done. Long timeout (345600s = 4 days) so the human is never rushed. Adjust 'command' to your built binary/script. NOTE: a plugin-bundled MCP server names its tools mcp__plugin_<plugin>_<server>__<tool>, so the matcher below is an alternation covering both the plugin form and the mcp__<server>__<tool> form used by a user-configured .mcp.json server. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
